creator: tut@nhamon.com.ua
text:
It had better turn POWERPATCH option off or just ignore it for legacy
driver ports probably - they use different nvidia_drv.so version.


BTW, following statement from files/pkg-message.in is wrong on my
7.1-PRERELEASE:

  "Note for users of FreeBSD 7.X and above: you MUST edit /boot/loader.conf
  and reboot, kldload'ing nvidia module will NOT do the trick."

'kldload nvidia.ko' works just fine.

-- 
Artem Naluzhnyy
